issue.title: `layout_stride::is_exhaustive` specification is problematic when there's an extent equal to 1

discussion.p:
Implementations disagree on the result of `lsm.is_exhaustive()`: `true` on libstdc++ and libc++, `false` on MSVC STL.
github.com/microsoft/STL/#5477 claims that the mapping is exhaustive in this case, but /6.2 requires this function to return `false`.
Should `is_exhaustive` be made to return `true` in this case (which is more correct and also easier to implement)?
